description_long: This candle features a cylindrical white wax body set within a dark, ornate metal holder. The metal holder is decorated with a raised fleur-de-lis motif and subtle beading, giving it a classic, decorative appearance. The holder has a single, curved handle attached to one side, reminiscent of a vintage mug or lantern. The top of the candle is flat, with a visible wick at the center, and the wax appears smooth and unused. The metal holder is opaque and has a matte, slightly rough finish, while the wax is semi-translucent. This object is likely designed for decorative use in urban outdoor or indoor settings, such as on a café table or park bench.
description: A white wax candle sits inside a dark, ornate metal holder with a fleur-de-lis design and a curved handle. The candle is unused, with a visible wick and a smooth wax surface.
description_view_0: Front view shows the fleur-de-lis motif on the metal holder and the flat top of the candle with the wick visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the curved handle and the slanted rim of the metal holder.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the plain back of the holder and the handle attachment, with the candle's wax surface visible inside.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the handle from a different angle and the decorative motif partially visible.
